abilities.description: Regenerate NICKNAME. (The next time he would be destroyed this turn, instead tap him, remove him from combat, and heal all damage on him.)

effect.description: Regenerate NICKNAME. (The next time he would be destroyed this turn, instead tap him, remove him from combat, and heal all damage on him.)
effect.name: Regenerate

replacements.description: Unrivaled Lethality — Double all damage NICKNAME would deal.

triggers.description: At the beginning of each end step, if NICKNAME dealt damage to another creature this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on him.
